projects.title: Nasa ParaWing-5C
content: When I was younger, my dad played with a traction kite, this kite made me dream !😍 So in summer 2020 I decided to made my own kite with some upgrades.
I started to search few plans and I began by sewing the wings and the center with our old sewing machine (it tooks me about 40 hours).
I have resumed this paused project in April 2021 and finish it by creating 48 flanges et 4 main lines (about 14 hours). A child's dream come true! 😁
Such good time to make it fly ! 🪁

projects.title: Mini
content: In 2018, my dad bought a 1979 Austin Leyland Mini, it has a 1980 Mini Metro 1.3L engine.
The engine was running but had poor compression and the body was well attacked by rust.
We started by separating the engine from the body. Then we had to cut out the sheet metal where there were holes and replace them by welding new ones.
The engine was completely degreased, cleaned and painted in red.
After about 1 year, we tackled the bodywork :
- coats of spray paint
- layers of putty
- ect ... ( that's long ! ^^)
Then the car was painted in dark blue/green metallic at a proffesionel. During this time, we painted the rims, beautiful !

Today, the engine, the wheels, the clutch, the transmission, the braking system, the windows, the headliner are all mounted ! We are waiting for the delivery of the seats made by a Belgian passionate.
We can't wait to ride the asphalt !

projects.title: Longboard
content: During this project, I was with my German exchange student. We decided to make our own longboard from scratch.
We first looked for plans on the internet that we printed in several times. Then we cut out our boards.
After rounding off the edges and sanding the plywood to make it smooth, we started to draw the designs we wanted to appear.
We put some color with acrylic paint and Posca pencils. 🖌️
And it's after a week of work that we had the pleasure to ride our boards ! 🛹

projects.title: Mini Surf
content: Here is a mini surf decoration made like a real one!
After getting a driftwood branch, I cut a small buchet and planed it to make it flat.
Then I glued a small board shape and cut the outline.
I made 3 small fins in this same wood. Finally for the decoration there is a small black border and an infinity symbol.
And hop on a shelf! 😋
